# novu_environments_with_keys (Data Source)

Environments with API keys data source. Lists all the environments within the organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) Environments list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `api_keys` (Attributes List) The environment's api keys (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--api_keys))
- `id` (String) The environment id
- `identifier` (String) The environment identifier
- `is_production` (Boolean) Whether it is the production environment
- `name` (String) The environment name
- `parent_environment_id` (String) The environment's parent id
- `slug` (String) The environment's slug

<a id="nestedatt--items--api_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.api_keys`

Read-Only:

- `hash` (String) The api key hash
- `owner_id` (String) ID of the user that owns the api key
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The api key
